name: Dev.to MCP Server — Developer Blog Platform
what_it_does: Dev.to MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with the Dev.to developer blogging platform — fetching articles, reading posts, searching content, posting new articles, managing drafts, and integrating Dev.to's developer community platform into agent-driven content creation and research workflows.
use_cases: Searching and reading Dev.to articles from research agents
Publishing technical blog posts to Dev.to from content creation agents
Drafting and scheduling articles from editorial workflow agents
Fetching trending articles from developer trend monitoring agents
Cross-posting technical content from multi-platform publishing agents
Researching community discussions on technical topics from knowledge agents
not_for: Non-Dev.to platforms (use Medium, Hashnode, or Ghost MCPs for those)
High-volume automated publishing (may violate Dev.to community guidelines)
Teams needing analytics beyond Dev.to's built-in stats
best_when: A developer content creator needs AI agents to publish, manage, or research articles on Dev.to's developer community platform.
avoid_when: You publish primarily on Medium, Substack, or your own blog — use platform-specific MCPs.

auth.notes: Dev.to API key required for write operations. Available from Dev.to account Settings > Extensions. Read operations may work without auth.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Dev.to: completely free platform and API
pricing.notes: Dev.to API is free. Community MCP server is free.

performance.rate_limits: Forem/Dev.to API: rate limits apply (not clearly documented)

known_agent_gotchas: Published articles are immediately public — always review before agent-publishing
Rate limits not clearly documented — monitor for 429 responses
Markdown content must be valid Dev.to-flavored markdown for proper rendering
Community MCP — Dev.to API version changes may break functionality
Article publication has real community impact — never auto-publish without review
Dev.to uses Forem backend — API docs at developers.forem.com
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. Dev.to API key. Published articles are public immediately. Community MCP. Never auto-publish without human review. API key in environment variable.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS. API key. Published articles are public. Community MCP. Human review before publish.
